ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cik" TEXT /* Central Index Key (CIK) */,
  "sic" INTEGER /* Standard Industrial Classification (SIC) */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "mic" TEXT /* Market Identifier Code (MIC) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listed_companies" (
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listed company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the company was listed */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Listing status of the company (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listed_companies_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listed_companies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listed company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume record */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listed company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading volume record */,
  "traded_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on the given date */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Total value of shares traded on the given date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction record */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listed company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction record */,
  "no_of_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions on the given date */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price of the stock on the given date */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price of the stock on the given date */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of transactions on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listed company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access log record */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listed company */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listed company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend record */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of market trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the market trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listed company */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above a certain threshold) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_alerts" (
  "user_alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
